suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update VAL-SCHEMA-003 wording so it explicitly permits `.shape`-based derivation for OpenCode raw args where required, instead of implying only `.omit/.pick/.extend` as valid derivation evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m3-scrutiny-fixes-round2 review confirmed the accepted fix uses runtime-derived `.shape` objects for tool({ args }) compatibility; current contract wording can misclassify this valid pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify mission-knowledge file lookup precedence to prefer repo-local `.factory/library/*` before user-home `~/.factory/library/*` paths.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m3-scrutiny-fixes-round2 transcript skeleton recorded a failed read at `/Users/vriesd/.factory/library/user-testing.md` while the repo-local file existed at `/Users/vriesd/projects/flow-opencode/.factory/library/user-testing.md`.
